transcript: Speaker A (Robot): আমি দেরি করেছি [I am late] Speaker B (Man): I am late. Speaker A: তুমি কি দেরি করেছো? [Are you late?] Speaker B: Are you late? Speaker A: কে দেরি করেছে? [Who is late?] Speaker B: Who is late? Speaker A: আমি ইংরেজি শিখতে চাই [I want to learn English] Speaker B: I want to learn English. Speaker A: তুমি কি ইংরেজি শিখতে চাও? [Do you want to learn English?] Speaker B: Do you want to learn English? Speaker A: আমি ভালো ইংরেজি বলতে চাই [I want to speak good English] Speaker B: I want to speak good English. Speaker A: তুমি কি ভালো ইংরেজি বলতে চাও? [Do you want to speak good English?] Speaker B: Do you want to speak good English? Speaker A: Very good. Speaker B: Thank you, ma'am. Speaker A: তোমার ইংলিশ তো খুব ভালো। তুমি ইংলিশ বলা কোথা থেকে শিখেছো? [Your English is very good. Where did you learn to speak English?] Speaker B: আমি ওটা MySivi অ্যাপ থেকে শিখেছি। [I learned it from MySivi app.] Speaker A: MySivi অ্যাপ? [MySivi app?] Speaker B: Yes ma'am, MySivi অ্যাপে শুধু ইংলিশ বলা শেখানো হয়। আর MySivi এত ভালোভাবে শেখায় যে ইংলিশ শেখা একদম বাচ্চাদের খেলার মতো মনে হয়। [Yes ma'am, MySivi app only teaches English speaking. And MySivi teaches so well that learning English feels just like child's play.] Speaker A: Nice, তাহলে আমাদের সবার এটা ইউজ করা উচিত। [Nice, then we all should use it.] Speaker B: আজকাল সবাই ইনস্টাগ্রামে অনেক টাইম ওয়েস্ট করে, কিন্তু আমি করি না। আমি ওই সময়টা MySivi অ্যাপকে দিই, এন্ড মাই ইংলিশ ইজ গেটিং বেটার এন্ড বেটার এভরিডে। [Nowadays everyone wastes a lot of time on Instagram, but I don't. I give that time to MySivi app, and my English is getting better and better everyday.] Speaker A: Fantastic! তাহলে সবার MySivi অ্যাপ ডাউনলোড করে নেওয়া উচিত। [Fantastic! Then everyone should download the MySivi app.]
on_screen_text: AMI DERI KORECHI [I am late] / I AM LATE / TUMI KI DERI KORECHO [Are you late?] / ARE YOU LATE / KE DERI KORECHE [Who is late?] / WHO IS LATE / AMI ENGLISH SHIKHTE CHAI [I want to learn English] / I WANT TO LEARN ENGLISH / TUMI KI ENGLISH SHIKHTE CHAO [Do you want to learn English?] / DO YOU WANT TO LEARN ENGLISH / AMI BHALO ENGLISH BOLTE CHAI [I want to speak good English] / I WANT TO SPEAK GOOD ENGLISH / TUMI KI BHALO ENGLISH BOLTE CHAO [Do you want to speak good English?] / DO YOU WANT TO SPEAK GOOD ENGLISH / VERY GOOD / THANK YOU MA'AM / TOMAR ENGLISH TO KHUB BHALO [Your English is very good] / TUMI ENGLISH BOLA KOTHA THEKE SHIKHECHO [Where did you learn to speak English?] / AMI OTA MYSIVI APP THEKE SHIKHECHI [I learned it from MySivi app] / MYSIVI APP / YES MA'AM MYSIVI APPE SHUDHU ENGLISH BOLA SHIKHANO HOY [Yes ma'am, MySivi app only teaches English speaking] / AR MYSIVI ETO BHALOBHABE SHIKHAY JE ENGLISH [And MySivi teaches so well that English] / SHIKHA EKDAM BACHCHADER KHELAR MOTO MONE HOY [learning feels just like child's play] / NICE TAHOLE AMADER SHOBAR ETA USE KORA UCHIT [Nice, then we all should use it] / AAJKAL SHOBAR INSTAGRAM-E ONEK TIME WASTE KORE [Nowadays everyone wastes a lot of time on Instagram] / KINTU AMI KORI NA [but I don't] / AMI OI SHOMOYTA MYSIVI APP-KE DEY [I give that time to MySivi app] / AND MY ENGLISH IS GETTING BETTER AND BETTER EVERY DAY / FANTASTIC TAHOLE SHOBAR MYSIVI APP DOWNLOAD KORE NEWA UCHIT [Fantastic, then everyone should download the MySivi app] / MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A man demonstrates his fluent English speaking skills to a futuristic robot avatar. He credits his proficiency to the MySivi app, which makes learning English easy and engaging. He encourages viewers to download MySivi instead of wasting time on social media.
